lines: Butters watched Portugal absolutely batter Croft's Uzbekistan 5-0 last night, which is hilarious because Butters also owns DR Congo, who then lost to Colombia — meaning he spent the evening simultaneously celebrating and eating shit. Magnificent.

Carter and The Foreman both own Colombia, who nicked it 1-0 against DR Congo — a team Carter also owns — so Carter basically paid himself a pound while kicking himself in the bollocks. Efficient stuff.
England managed a 0-0 with Ghana, which is the footballing equivalent of going on a date and spending the whole evening talking about your ex — Carter and Wilmot should both be deeply embarrassed.

Morocco are the golden goose today — Butters, Callum, Jim, and Wilmot all own them, so a win against Haiti could hand four cunts a boost simultaneously, which is either beautiful or an absolute waste of everyone's time depending on your position.

Keep an eye on South Korea vs South Africa — Ellis needs her girl to get the win to have any hope of clawing back from 13 points, because Paraguay and New Zealand are doing absolutely fuck all and Argentina can't carry this whole operation on their own.
